This is the same exchange Android gets for free via its FRUser.login flow.  The previous commit (f338815) handled the case where FRUser.currentUser exists but .token is nil — this fix handles the deeper case where FRUser.currentUser itself is nil after the PIN authentication journey on iOS."

tasks.title: What changed: When node.next() completes with user == nil AND FRUser.currentUser == nil (the last else branch), instead of silently resolving with tokens: "", it now calls FRUser.login to explicitly trigger the OAuth token exchange that FRSession.authenticate() skipped. This is the same exchange Android gets for free via its FRUser.login flow.  The previous commit (f338815) handled the case where FRUser.currentUser exists but .token is nil — this fix handles the deeper case where FRUser.currentUser itself is nil after the PIN authentication journey on iOS.
